info.title: AuthorizationManagementClient
info.description: Access reviews service provides the workflow for running access reviews on different kind of resources.

get.description: Lists the accessReviewHistoryDefinitions available from this provider, definition instances are only available for 30 days after creation.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: The scope of the resource.

parameters.name: $filter
parameters.description: The filter to apply on the operation. Only standard filters on definition name and created date are supported

get.description: Get access review history definition by definition Id

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: The scope of the resource.

parameters.name: historyDefinitionId
parameters.description: The id of the access review history definition.

put.description: Create a scheduled or one-time Access Review History Definition

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: The scope of the resource.

parameters.name: historyDefinitionId
parameters.description: The id of the access review history definition.

parameters.name: properties
parameters.description: Access review history definition properties.

delete.description: Delete an access review history definition

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: The scope of the resource.

parameters.name: historyDefinitionId
parameters.description: The id of the access review history definition.

get.description: Get access review history definition instances by definition Id

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: The scope of the resource.

parameters.name: historyDefinitionId
parameters.description: The id of the access review history definition.

post.description: Generates a uri which can be used to retrieve review history data. This URI has a TTL of 1 day and can be retrieved by fetching the accessReviewHistoryDefinition object.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: The scope of the resource.

parameters.name: historyDefinitionId
parameters.description: The id of the access review history definition.

parameters.name: instanceId
parameters.description: The id of the access review history definition instance to generate a URI for.

get.description: Get access review schedule definitions

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: The scope of the resource.

parameters.name: $filter
parameters.description: The filter to apply on the operation. Other than standard filters, one custom filter option is supported : 'assignedToMeToReview()'. When one specified $filter=assignedToMeToReview(), only items that are assigned to the calling user to review are returned

get.description: Get access review default settings for the subscription

put.description: Get access review default settings for the subscription

parameters.name: properties
parameters.description: Access review schedule settings.

AccessRecommendationType.description: The feature- generated recommendation shown to the reviewer.

AccessReviewApplyResult.description: The outcome of applying the decision.

AccessReviewContactedReviewerListResult.description: The response of a AccessReviewContactedReviewer list operation.

value.description: The AccessReviewContactedReviewer items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

AccessReviewContactedReviewerProperties.description: Properties of access review contacted reviewer.

userDisplayName.description: The display name of the reviewer

userPrincipalName.description: The user principal name of the reviewer

createdDateTime.description: Date Time when the reviewer was contacted.

type.description: The type of decision target : User/ServicePrincipal

id.description: The id of principal whose access was reviewed.

displayName.description: The display name of the user whose access was reviewed.

insightCreatedDateTime.description: Date Time when the insight was created.

AccessReviewDecisionListResult.description: The response of a AccessReviewDecision list operation.

value.description: The AccessReviewDecision items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

membershipTypes.description: Every decision item in an access review represents a principal's membership to a resource. This property represents details of the membership. Examples of this detail might be whether the principal has direct access or indirect access

principal.description: Principal associated with the decision record. Can be AccessReviewDecisionUserIdentity or AccessReviewDecisionServicePrincipalIdentity

resource.description: Resource associated with this decision record.

recommendation.description: The feature- generated recommendation shown to the reviewer.

decision.description: The decision on the approval step. This value is initially set to NotReviewed. Approvers can take action of Approve/Deny

justification.description: Justification provided by approvers for their action

reviewedDateTime.description: Date Time when a decision was taken.

applyResult.description: The outcome of applying the decision.

appliedDateTime.description: The date and time when the review decision was applied.

insights.description: This is the collection of insights for this decision item.

id.description: The id of resource associated with a decision record.

displayName.description: The display name of resource associated with a decision record.

appId.description: The appId for the service principal entity being reviewed

userPrincipalName.description: The user principal name of the user whose access was reviewed.

lastSignInDateTime.description: Date Time when the user signed into the tenant.

value.description: The AccessReviewHistoryInstance items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

AccessReviewHistoryDefinitionListResult.description: The response of a AccessReviewHistoryDefinition list operation.

value.description: The AccessReviewHistoryDefinition items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

displayName.description: The display name for the history definition.

reviewHistoryPeriodStartDateTime.description: Date time used when selecting review data, all reviews included in data start on or after this date. For use only with one-time/non-recurring reports.

reviewHistoryPeriodEndDateTime.description: Date time used when selecting review data, all reviews included in data end on or before this date. For use only with one-time/non-recurring reports.

decisions.description: Collection of review decisions which the history data should be filtered on. For example if Approve and Deny are supplied the data will only contain review results in which the decision maker approved or denied a review request.

status.description: This read-only field specifies the of the requested review history data. This is either requested, in-progress, done or error.

createdDateTime.description: Date time when history definition was created

createdBy.description: The user or other identity who created this history definition.

scopes.description: A collection of scopes used when selecting review history data

settings.description: Recurrence settings for recurring history reports, skip for one-time reports.

instances.description: Set of access review history instances for this history definition.

AccessReviewHistoryDefinitionStatus.description: This read-only field specifies the of the requested review history data. This is either requested, in-progress, done or error.

id.description: The access review history definition instance id.

name.description: The access review history definition instance unique id.

properties.description: Access Review History Definition Instance properties.

AccessReviewHistoryInstanceProperties.description: Access Review History Definition Instance properties.

reviewHistoryPeriodStartDateTime.description: Date time used when selecting review data, all reviews included in data start on or after this date. For use only with one-time/non-recurring reports.

reviewHistoryPeriodEndDateTime.description: Date time used when selecting review data, all reviews included in data end on or before this date. For use only with one-time/non-recurring reports.

displayName.description: The display name for the parent history definition.

status.description: Status of the requested review history instance data. This is either requested, in-progress, done or error. The state transitions are as follows - Requested -> InProgress -> Done -> Expired

runDateTime.description: Date time when the history data report is scheduled to be generated.

fulfilledDateTime.description: Date time when the history data report is scheduled to be generated.

downloadUri.description: Uri which can be used to retrieve review history data. To generate this Uri, generateDownloadUri() must be called for a specific accessReviewHistoryDefinitionInstance. The link expires after a 24 hour period. Callers can see the expiration date time by looking at the 'se' parameter in the generated uri.

expiration.description: Date time when history data report expires and the associated data is deleted.

AccessReviewHistoryScheduleSettings.description: Recurrence settings of an Access Review History Definition.

pattern.description: Access Review History Definition recurrence settings.

range.description: Access Review History Definition recurrence settings.

AccessReviewInstanceListResult.description: The response of a AccessReviewInstance list operation.

value.description: The AccessReviewInstance items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

status.description: This read-only field specifies the status of an access review instance.

startDateTime.description: The DateTime when the review instance is scheduled to be start.

endDateTime.description: The DateTime when the review instance is scheduled to end.

reviewers.description: This is the collection of reviewers.

backupReviewers.description: This is the collection of backup reviewers.

reviewersType.description: This field specifies the type of reviewers for a review. Usually for a review, reviewers are explicitly assigned. However, in some cases, the reviewers may not be assigned and instead be chosen dynamically. For example managers review or self review.

AccessReviewInstanceReviewersType.description: This field specifies the type of reviewers for a review. Usually for a review, reviewers are explicitly assigned. However, in some cases, the reviewers may not be assigned and instead be chosen dynamically. For example managers review or self review.

AccessReviewInstanceStatus.description: This read-only field specifies the status of an access review instance.

AccessReviewRecurrencePattern.description: Recurrence Pattern of an Access Review Schedule Definition.

type.description: The recurrence type : weekly, monthly, etc.

interval.description: The interval for recurrence. For a quarterly review, the interval is 3 for type : absoluteMonthly.

AccessReviewRecurrencePatternType.description: The recurrence type : weekly, monthly, etc.

AccessReviewRecurrenceRange.description: Recurrence Range of an Access Review Schedule Definition.

type.description: The recurrence range type. The possible values are: endDate, noEnd, numbered.

numberOfOccurrences.description: The number of times to repeat the access review. Required and must be positive if type is numbered.

startDate.description: The DateTime when the review is scheduled to be start. This could be a date in the future. Required on create.

endDate.description: The DateTime when the review is scheduled to end. Required if type is endDate

AccessReviewRecurrenceRangeType.description: The recurrence range type. The possible values are: endDate, noEnd, numbered.

AccessReviewRecurrenceSettings.description: Recurrence Settings of an Access Review Schedule Definition.

pattern.description: Access Review schedule definition recurrence pattern.

range.description: Access Review schedule definition recurrence range.

AccessReviewResult.description: Represents a reviewer's decision for a given review

AccessReviewReviewer.description: Descriptor for what needs to be reviewed

AccessReviewScheduleDefinitionListResult.description: The response of a AccessReviewScheduleDefinition list operation.

value.description: The AccessReviewScheduleDefinition items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

displayName.description: The display name for the schedule definition.

status.description: This read-only field specifies the status of an accessReview.

descriptionForAdmins.description: The description provided by the access review creator and visible to admins.

descriptionForReviewers.description: The description provided by the access review creator to be shown to reviewers.

createdBy.description: The user or other identity who created this review.

scope.description: This is used to define what to include in scope of the review. The scope definition includes the resourceId and roleDefinitionId.

reviewers.description: This is the collection of reviewers.

backupReviewers.description: This is the collection of backup reviewers.

reviewersType.description: This field specifies the type of reviewers for a review. Usually for a review, reviewers are explicitly assigned. However, in some cases, the reviewers may not be assigned and instead be chosen dynamically. For example managers review or self review.

instances.description: This is the collection of instances returned when one does an expand on it.

AccessReviewScheduleDefinitionReviewersT.description: This field specifies the type of reviewers for a review. Usually for a review, reviewers are explicitly assigned. However, in some cases, the reviewers may not be assigned and instead be chosen dynamically. For example managers review or self review.

AccessReviewScheduleDefinitionStatus.description: This read-only field specifies the status of an accessReview.

mailNotificationsEnabled.description: Flag to indicate whether sending mails to reviewers and the review creator is enabled.

reminderNotificationsEnabled.description: Flag to indicate whether sending reminder emails to reviewers are enabled.

defaultDecisionEnabled.description: Flag to indicate whether reviewers are required to provide a justification when reviewing access.

justificationRequiredOnApproval.description: Flag to indicate whether the reviewer is required to pass justification when recording a decision.

defaultDecision.description: This specifies the behavior for the autoReview feature when an access review completes.

autoApplyDecisionsEnabled.description: Flag to indicate whether auto-apply capability, to automatically change the target object access resource, is enabled. If not enabled, a user must, after the review completes, apply the access review.

recommendationsEnabled.description: Flag to indicate whether showing recommendations to reviewers is enabled.

recommendationLookBackDuration.description: Recommendations for access reviews are calculated by looking back at 30 days of data(w.r.t the start date of the review) by default. However, in some scenarios, customers want to change how far back to look at and want to configure 60 days, 90 days, etc. instead. This setting allows customers to configure this duration. The value should be in ISO  8601 format (http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601#Durations).This code can be used to convert TimeSpan to a valid interval string: XmlConvert.ToString(new TimeSpan(hours, minutes, seconds))

instanceDurationInDays.description: The duration in days for an instance.

AccessReviewScope.description: Descriptor for what needs to be reviewed

resourceId.description: ResourceId in which this review is getting created

roleDefinitionId.description: This is used to indicate the role being reviewed

principalType.description: The identity type user/servicePrincipal to review

assignmentState.description: The role assignment state eligible/active to review

inactiveDuration.description: Duration users are inactive for. The value should be in ISO  8601 format (http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601#Durations).This code can be used to convert TimeSpan to a valid interval string: XmlConvert.ToString(new TimeSpan(hours, minutes, seconds))

expandNestedMemberships.description: Flag to indicate whether to expand nested memberships or not.

includeInheritedAccess.description: Flag to indicate whether to expand nested memberships or not.

includeAccessBelowResource.description: Flag to indicate whether to expand nested memberships or not.

excludeResourceId.description: This is used to indicate the resource id(s) to exclude

excludeRoleDefinitionId.description: This is used to indicate the role definition id(s) to exclude

AccessReviewScopeAssignmentState.description: The role assignment state eligible/active to review

AccessReviewScopePrincipalType.description: The identity type user/servicePrincipal to review

DecisionTargetType.description: The type of decision target : User/ServicePrincipal

DefaultDecisionType.description: This specifies the behavior for the autoReview feature when an access review completes.

ErrorDefinition.title: Error
ErrorDefinition.description: Error description and code explaining why an operation failed.

error.description: Error of the list gateway status.

ErrorDefinitionProperties.title: Error
ErrorDefinitionProperties.description: Error description and code explaining why an operation failed.

Operation.description: The definition of a Microsoft.Authorization operation.

isDataAction.description: Indicates whether the operation is a data action

OperationDisplay.description: The display information for a Microsoft.Authorization operation.

resource.description: The resource on which the operation is performed.

operation.description: The operation that users can perform.

value.description: The Operation items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

principalId.description: The id of principal which needs to be approved/denied.

resourceId.description: The id of resource which needs to be approved/denied.

decision.description: The decision to make. Approvers can take action of Approve/Deny

justification.description: Justification provided by approvers for their action

RecordAllDecisionsResult.description: The decision to make. Approvers can take action of Approve/Deny
